description.en: t-SNE became one of the most recognizable tools for visualizing high-dimensional data. It converts pairwise neighborhood relationships into probabilities and then lays points out in a low-dimensional map with a heavy-tailed distribution. The result often reveals local clusters that are hard to see in raw feature space.
description.zh: t-SNE 成为最具辨识度的高维数据可视化工具之一。它把成对邻域关系转为概率，再用重尾分布把点布置在低维图上。结果常能展示原始特征空间中难以看见的局部簇结构。

html.en: Researchers needed intuitive ways to inspect embeddings, digits, gene expression, and other high-dimensional data.
html.zh: 研究者需要直观方法检查嵌入、数字、基因表达等高维数据。

html.en: t-SNE preserves local neighbor probabilities while using a t distribution to reduce crowding in the 2D map.
html.zh: t-SNE 保持局部邻域概率，并用 t 分布减少二维图中的拥挤问题。

html.en: Experts generally treat t-SNE as a powerful exploratory visualization tool that must be interpreted carefully. Its long-term legacy is making high-dimensional embeddings visually inspectable, while teaching users that cluster maps can be persuasive but not definitive evidence.
html.zh: 专家通常把 t-SNE 视为强大的探索性可视化工具，但也强调必须谨慎解读。它的长期影响在于让高维嵌入变得可视化可检查，同时提醒用户簇图有说服力但不是决定性证据。

method.zh: 保持邻域的非线性嵌入

artifact.zh: t 分布随机邻域嵌入

material.zh: 《机器学习研究杂志》 论文与作者资料

demo.zh: 把高维邻域转为二维簇

text.en: A parameter that roughly controls neighborhood size.
text.zh: 一个大致控制邻域大小的参数。

text.en: The method emphasizes nearby points more than global distances.
text.zh: 该方法更强调邻近点，而非全局距离。

text.en: Heavy tails help separate groups in the low-dimensional map.
text.zh: 重尾分布帮助低维图中群组分开。
